success
Bead delivers exactly the deterministic Executor+Reviewer fixture SD-024 §Bead 6.5 calls for: fail-N-then-approve via real `bead.Store`, real `RunWithConfig`, and real event assertions — no synthetic telemetry seam. Scope is tight (two files, 311 LoC), atomic counters keep it safe under repeated invocation, and the bonus `_ThresholdEscalation` test pre-validates the very signal beads 7-9 will reuse. I was unable to execute the AC `go test` command in this sandbox, but the API surface used (`agent.ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc`, `agent.BeadReviewerFunc`, `config.NewTestConfigForLoop`, `RunWithConfig`, `ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime`) is consistent with SD-024's Stage 1 plan.
